subject: Your free sticker (NEW)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
As a token of our appreciation, I want to send you our NEW sticker. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2PkBAFY1vCGfWgaYSsDRMN6aaaaBRFdBMFACEoa?k=A@sDrFq&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=p&n=&1=rArBrE0phoUIhoTIRsWIboQqko02jsSuU10tVm03030rVIUIr&303)

Friend,

I want to thank you for everything you've done for our movement by sending you our brand new sticker for FREE.
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2PkBAFY1vCGfWgaYSsDRMN6aaaaBRFdBMFACEoa?k=A@sDrFq&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=q&n=&1=rArBrE0phoUIhoTIRsWIboQqko02jsSuU10tVm03030rVIUIr&303)
Because only a limited number of Big League Trump Supporter Stickers were produced, I can only reserve your free one until MIDNIGHT.****[**Please go here to get your free sticker.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2PkBAFY1vCGfWgaYSsDRMN6aaaaBRFdBMFACEoa?k=A@sDrFq&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=l&n=&1=rArBrE0phoUIhoTIRsWIboQqko02jsSuU10tVm03030rVIUIr&303)

Show the world that you stand with our next president and are ready to Make America Great Again!

[**Order your FREE sticker by MIDNIGHT.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2PkBAFY1vCGfWgaYSsDRMN6aaaaBRFdBMFACEoa?k=A@sDrFq&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=n&n=&1=rArBrE0phoUIhoTIRsWIboQqko02jsSuU10tVm03030rVIUIr&303)

Thanks,

[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2PkBAFY1vCGfWgaYSsDRMN6aaaaBRFdBMFACEoa?k=A@sDrFq&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=o&n=&1=rArBrE0phoUIhoTIRsWIboQqko02jsSuU10tVm03030rVIUIr&303)

Alex
Trump Store Manager

****[GET YOURS NOW](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba2PkBAFY1vCGfWgaYSsDRMN6aaaaBRFdBMFACEoa?k=A@sDrFq&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=m&n=&1=rArBrE0phoUIhoTIRsWIboQqko02jsSuU10tVm03030rVIUIr&303)****

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Democrats.org
subject: Our holiday card for the Obamas
body:
Help us pick a winner. The Democratic Party**Vote for your favorite 2016 holiday card -- and we'll send you the winning design to sign for the First Family!

** **[PICK A CARD](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c21b/4067b0a/22f920b83/7e066812/1712390017/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Your-Holiday-Card-Vote1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+PICK+A+CARD&utm_campaign=em_20161213_dnc_nd&source=em_20161213_dnc_nd")**
[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Your-Holiday-Card-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20161213_dnc_nd&source=em_20161213_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Your-Holiday-Card-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=em_20161213_dnc_nd&source=em_20161213_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Your-Holiday-Card-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=em_20161213_dnc_nd&source=em_20161213_dnc_nd")
**[http://my.democrats.org/Your-Holiday-Card-Vote](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Your-Holiday-Card-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+httpmydemocratsorgYourHolidayCardVote&utm_campaign=em_20161213_dnc_nd&source=em_20161213_dnc_nd")**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c21b/4067b0a/22f920b83/7e06681a/1712390017/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161213_dnc_nd&source=em_20161213_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c21b/4067b0a/22f920b83/7e06681b/1712390017/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161213_dnc_nd&source=em_20161213_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c21b/4067b0a/22f920b83/7e066818/1712390017/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161213_dnc_nd&source=em_20161213_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c21b/4067b0a/22f920b83/7e066819/1712390017/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161213_dnc_nd&source=em_20161213_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: DEVELOPING (via DSCC)
subject: Are you ready for the fights ahead, Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We know the 2016 election is still on everyone's mind, but we can't hold back what Senate Democrats will face in 2018... [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eeed/2b07114c/405e2b14/7368e7be/3006286610/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-2018?source=PT-20161213-DevelopingDS-ProsHV")
---
_**Larry Sabato on 2018: "Democrats are VERY exposed"**_
[**Sign on to show you 're ready for the fights ahead >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eeed/2b07114c/405e2b14/7368e7be/3006286610/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-2018?source=PT-20161213-DevelopingDS-ProsHV")
Friend -- As much as the results of 2016 still sting, we can't ignore what we're facing over the next two years. **And elections expert Larry Sabato just sounded the alarm:**
**"(Democrats) face a near-historic level of exposure in the group of Senate seats being contested in two years."** He's right: Democrats will defend 25 out of 33 seats up for grabs -- _only once in the last 70 years has so much blue turf been on the line!_

[**So we need to know, Friend: Will you join Democrats in the fights ahead? Add your name to stand with the DSCC today:**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eeed/2b07114c/405e2b14/7368e7be/3006286610/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-2018?source=PT-20161213-DevelopingDS-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A
**I Will Fight for Democrats** : [**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eeed/2b07114c/405e2b14/7368e7be/3006286610/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-2018?source=PT-20161213-DevelopingDS-ProsHV")

Our work starts NOW to protect our Democratic incumbents, especially when 10 of them will run in states that Donald Trump carried.

**But protecting our seats -- and flipping the Senate -- can only happen if grassroots supporters stand with us.**

[**Friend, we 're counting on your solidarity today. Please sign on to show you're committed to Democratic victory >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eeed/2b07114c/405e2b14/7368e7be/3006286610/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-2018?source=PT-20161213-DevelopingDS-ProsHV")

Thank you,
Team DSCC A quick note on donations, Friend: We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

clean_body: We know the 2016 election is still on everyone's mind, but we can't hold back what Senate Democrats will face in 2018... "" Larry Sabato on 2018: "Democrats are VERY exposed" "" Friend -- As much as the results of 2016 still sting, we can't ignore what we're facing over the next two years. And elections expert Larry Sabato just sounded the alarm: "(Democrats) face a near-historic level of exposure in the group of Senate seats being contested in two years." He's right: Democrats will defend 25 out of 33 seats up for grabs -- only once in the last 70 years has so much blue turf been on the line! "" Your Action History: Name : Friend Last Petition Signed : N/A I Will Fight for Democrats : "" Our work starts NOW to protect our Democratic incumbents, especially when 10 of them will run in states that Donald Trump carried. But protecting our seats -- and flipping the Senate -- can only happen if grassroots supporters stand with us. "" Thank you, Team DSCC A quick note on donations, Friend: We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts. Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back. name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: RE: ❗ Ohio's new abortion ban
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7759/24c69fd9/1c28e62/18efb0bc/967849132/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all&source=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all")
---

Peter,

I wanted to make sure you didn't miss the news: Ohio Republicans are moving forward with the most extreme abortion ban in the country after being emboldened by Donald Trump's win.

Ohio has become a testing ground for anti-choice legislation -- banning late-term abortions, cutting funding for rape crisis centers that discuss abortion, and forcing women who seek abortions to receive and pay for an ultrasound to check for a fetal heartbeat.

Republicans aren't going to stop unless we stand up to them.

**We are prioritizing Ohio races for 2018. Donate $3 now to help defeat extreme Republicans:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Ohio-And-Beyond](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7759/24c69fd9/1c28e62/18efb0bd/967849132/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161208_email_OHheartbeat?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOhioAndBeyond&utm_campaign=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all&source=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

_\-----------Original Message----------
From: Kate Black, EMILY's List
Sent: Thurs, Dec 8, 2016 at 8:48 p.m._

Peter,

The legislature in my home state of Ohio just passed a law banning abortion after _six weeks_ -- with no exception for survivors of rape or incest.

This is as extreme as abortion bans get. Many women don't find out they're pregnant until they're further along than six weeks, so this bill would leave them unable to access abortion services at all.

And the only reason it passed is because Republicans control both chambers of the Ohio state legislature. That's why Ohio's a priority for EMILY's List in 2018.

**[Donate $3 today so that we can recruit pro-choice Democratic women to run in Ohio-- and anywhere else Republicans try to ban abortion.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7759/24c69fd9/1c28e62/18efb0be/967849132/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161208_email_OHheartbeat?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+Donate+3+today+so+that+we+can+recruit+pr&utm_campaign=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all&source=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all")**

The Supreme Court has already struck down a similar abortion ban that North Dakota passed a few years ago, and another was passed and struck down in Arkansas too.

But thanks to Donald Trump's victory, Republicans in Ohio were emboldened to move their extreme bill forward during the lame duck session.

Their hope is that the legislation will be challenged and end up before the Supreme Court, where there's still an open seat. Senate Republicans have obstructed President Obama's nominee for _nine months_ , so it looks like Trump will get to pick the next justice.

And he's promised to appoint anti-choice ones.

Republicans across the country are taking Donald Trump's win as an opportunity to step up their attacks on choice and abortion rights. Now more than ever we need to make sure we have pro-choice Democratic women running against them wherever and whenever we can.

Some say, "As Ohio goes, so goes the nation." But we can't let this be the new normal. Ohio's extreme and unconstitutional move puts women and families at risk.

**Donate $3 now to defeat extreme anti-choice Republicans like those in Ohio and stop the abortion bans:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Ohio-And-Beyond](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7759/24c69fd9/1c28e62/18efb0bf/967849132/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161208_email_OHheartbeat?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOhioAndBeyond&utm_campaign=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all&source=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7759/24c69fd9/1c28e62/18efb0b8/967849132/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161208_email_OHheartbeat?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all&source=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7759/24c69fd9/1c28e62/18efb0b9/967849132/VEsA/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all&source=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7759/24c69fd9/1c28e62/18efb0ba/967849132/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all&source=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7759/24c69fd9/1c28e62/18efb0bb/967849132/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all&source=WPEFEX12N_digital_email_20161213_OHheartbeatKick_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
